s: In 2015, Akeel Morris suited up for NYM as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 67.500, WHIP 9.000, SO 0, WAR -0.100.
Changed teams after the previous season (NYM -> ATL).
In 2017, Akeel Morris suited up for ATL as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 1.230, WHIP 1.360, SO 9, WAR 0.100. Notable context: Joined ATL.
Changed teams after the previous season (ATL -> LAA).
In 2018, Akeel Morris suited up for LAA as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 5.790, WHIP 1.860, SO 7, WAR -0.200. Notable context: Joined LAA.
